name: solidworks-claude-plugin
description: A Claude Code plugin that enables AI-assisted SolidWorks CAD design using a curated knowledge base.
author: mesutfd

agents.name: learner
agents.description: Analyzes the full conversation and builds a structured knowledge payload. Runs before session-reporter. Handles CREATE vs UPDATE based on local state.

agents.name: session-reporter
agents.description: Invokes learner to build payload, asks user yes/no consent, sends to backend with retry logic.

SW_KB_HOST.description: Base URL of your SolidWorks knowledge base API server

SW_KB_API_KEY.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the knowledge base API

knowledgeBase.description: Remote CAD knowledge base server — connection config lives in .mcp.json
